products.name: Firefly Compact Flight System
products.descriptor: Lightweight compact autonomy system for BVLOS rotorcraft operations, NDAA 2023 compliant

evidence.snippet:
### Firefly Compact Flight System
#### Lightweight autonomy system enables safe and reliable Beyond Visual Line of Sight (BVLOS) flight. Capabilities include autonomous ship recovery and ship-to-shore CONOPS: Departure, approach, and precise cargo deliveries in unprepared, confined environments.
Currently accepting customers for beta product:

products.notes: Two hardware variants offered (with LiDAR and without). Beta customers being accepted. NDAA 2023 compliance explicitly claimed on product page.

products.name: RUC-60 (Responsive Uncrewed Capability)
products.descriptor: Optionally piloted UH-60 Black Hawk autonomy conversion for contested logistics missions

evidence.snippet:
#### Responsive Uncrewed Capability (RUC-60)
#### OPTIONALLY PILOTED BLACK HAWK UH-60 FOR CONTESTED LOGISTICS
Uses Captain, a deterministic autonomy architecture for mission assurance in challenging environments.

products.name: CAPTAIN
products.descriptor: Deterministic autonomy architecture for mission assurance in challenging environments

evidence.snippet:
![CAPTAIN brand asset 2\_2x.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/8d6a2d_a95d83bf15114986beb2e46cf3c211e1~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_367,h_105,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/CAPTAIN%20brand%20asset%202_2x.png)
Complete assurance solution
We provide technology, process, and step-by-step guidance
Uses Captain, a deterministic autonomy architecture for mission assurance in challenging environments.

products.notes: CAPTAIN is the underlying autonomy architecture used in RUC-60. Marketed as a "complete assurance solution" on homepage with sensors, computing, software, and UX components. No standalone ordering language found in corpus.

products.name: Proxim: Inspection
products.descriptor: Inspection-focused autonomous flight solution offered under Near Earth's Proxim brand
products.notes: Only evidence in corpus is a footer link to https://www.proxim.aero — the proxim.aero domain was crawled but marked skipped_out_of_scope. Category, readiness, and compliance are unresolvable without fetching that site.

unresolved_questions: Proxim: Inspection (https://www.proxim.aero) was crawled as skipped_out_of_scope — product category, readiness, NDAA, and Blue UAS compliance are all unknown without fetching that site.
CAPTAIN has no standalone product page in the corpus; ordering/readiness language not found — could not confirm production status.
https://www.nearearth.aero/firefly was skipped_class_budget; the fetched Firefly content came from a staging URL (resource-0006). The canonical /firefly page may contain additional detail.
https://www.nearearth.aero/copy-of-firefly-miniaturized-flight was also skipped_class_budget and may contain a miniaturized variant not captured here.

fetch_requests.reason: Proxim: Inspection is listed as a distinct product site in Near Earth's footer but was skipped_out_of_scope. Fetching would resolve product category, readiness, NDAA, and Blue UAS compliance.
Canonical Firefly product page was skipped_class_budget; current content sourced from staging URL. May contain additional specs, compliance claims, or variant detail.
Skipped page that may describe a miniaturized Firefly variant not enumerated in the current catalog.
